meaning: v.加速,派出adj.畅通的,迅速的
examples: We tried to help you expedite your plans.
We have developed rapid order processing to expedite deliveries to customers.
The facilitating agencies expedite the clearance of international cargo.
May said the airlines have taken numerous steps to expedite travel through the airports.
But I also believe that an On-Off relationship, if done correctly, can expedite a commitment.
